case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. ANDERSEN, RUBY

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSEN, RUBY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSEN, RUBY SUMMONS ISSUED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT ANDERSEN, RUBY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUL-26-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-02-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON AUG-02-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSEN, RUBY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 351 BUCHANAN STREET APT. #C. SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102 $1,684.26 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,684.26, LEASE FORFEITED, AND COST PER COST BILL. DEFENDANTS NAME ORDERED AMENDED TO BE RUBY ANDERSEN AKA RUBY ANDERSON PER AMENDMENT OF THE COMPLAINT ON ITS FACE BY THE COURT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $6.13 FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION

#8 MARY C. MORGAN, JUDGE. SANDRA NAYLOR REPORTER. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT. OPENING STATEMENTS WAIVED. PLTF'S. WITNESS, SWORN AND EXAMINED. PLTF'S. EXHIBITS, I.D. AND EVID. CROSS EXAMINATION OF PLTF'S. WITNESS BY DEFT. IN PRO PER, FOLLOWED BY REDIRECT FOLLOWED BY RECROSS. NOTHING FURTHER. PLTF. RESTS. DEFT, IN PRO PER, TESTITIES ON BEHALF ON HERSELF. NOTHING FURTHER. THE COURT AFTER HEARING THE TESTIMONY AND RECEIVING THE EXHIBITS, ORDERED JUGDMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION OF 351 BUCHANAN STREET APT. #C SAN FRANCISCO, CA. AND FOR FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE AND FOR PAST DUE RENT IN THE SUM OF $1,684.26 AND COST PER COST BILL. THE COURT ORDERS THE COMPLAINT AMENDED ON ITS FACE TO NAME THE DEFENDANT AS RUBY ANDERSEN AKA RUBY ANDERSON.
